collapsed_anomalies.description: Anomalies detected by teacher but missed by student

hallucinated_anomalies.description: Normal samples incorrectly flagged as anomalies by student

recommendations: High anomaly collapse rate (22.9%). Consider: 1) Increasing student capacity, 2) Adjusting distillation alpha to emphasize anomaly scores, 3) Using harder mining for anomaly samples.

recommendations: Failure rates within acceptable bounds. Focus on incremental improvements and edge case handling.
